one_law: One row = one client-demo recipe (GOAL · DONE · VERIFY · Supabase proof). One tick = one row.

items.title: Fix public install/package claim vs PyPI reality
items.goal: Eval page and PyPI probe agree — no false install promise
items.done_when: probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py ok OR eval copy says GitHub clone pending
items.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py --json && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/eval --marker sourcea-boot && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
items.client_demo: Open /eval — show install line matches live PyPI or honest GitHub fallback

items.title: Forge Terminal: fix Connecting… or show honest offline state
items.goal: Terminal shows online send path OR clear offline + forge@sourcea.app fallback
items.done_when: Terminal page markers present; health/send path returns ok or offline banner
items.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/sourcea/forge/terminal && --marker "Forge Terminal" && --marker "data-sa-proof-cta" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
items.client_demo: Send one prompt on terminal — response or explicit offline state

items.title: Verify intake submit: store lead + confirmation + notification
items.goal: Start/intake POST stores row in Supabase and shows success reference
items.done_when: mvp-intake-config exposes worker URL; verify_mvp_intake_proof_v1 PASS
items.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_mvp_intake_proof_v1.py --json && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
items.client_demo: Submit test lead on /start — show confirmation ID + Supabase row
